title: rottlera stylaris
intro: Rottlera stylaris, also known as the 'Kadukkai' or 'Karkatashringi', is a type of plant native to tropical regions, specifically in the Indian subcontinent. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory effects, which have been found to have antiseptic and wound-healing properties. The health benefits of Rottlera stylaris include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate digestive issues, and even exhibit antioxidant properties. The plant can be prepared into herbal remedies such as decoctions, infusions, and ointments, which have been used to treat various health conditions in traditional Ayurvedic medicine.
